page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs derived from 48 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor, utilizing simultaneous multithreading with 2 threads per core. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU encryption tests ranking in the top 10%. Single-core performance and PassMark database operations fall within the top 25%, demonstrating strong processing capabilities. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is strong, though large uncached read and write operations perform at average levels. The server also exhibits strong throughput in static web serving and Redis SET operations, executing 81.23 million operations per second.

Given its high memory density and dedicated AMD EPYC compute resources, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The high vCPU and RAM allocation makes it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise web serving, software compilation, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor on the x86_64 architecture. With 48 physical cores and 2 threads per core, it delivers 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, it demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance and encryption capabilities, alongside strong single-core performance, database operations, and Redis throughput. This hardware profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads by offering high resource density without the added cost of bundled storage. It is highly suited for large in-memory databases, heavy web serving, software compilation, and data processing tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server with 96 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 768 GB RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for database and memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual server featuring ninety-six dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of RAM.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
Top-tier multi-core CPU and encryption benchmark performance
Strong throughput for Redis operations and static web serving
Best suited for in-memory databases and memory-intensive enterprise workloads
